### Business for Sale Services
Small Business Deal Advisors is a discount-commission business brokerage firm that offers the largest inventory of small businesses and franchises for sale in Michigan and throughout the US and Canada. We provide a best-in-class confidential marketing and broker service to business owners who are seeking to sell their small business. We provide professional materials, an in-depth valuation, powerful marketing, NDA processing, buyer introductions, and guidance throughout the sale process.

## Email Finder FAQ
If you can't find the answer to your question here, visit the dedicated section in our Help Center.
[Visit Help Center](https://getprospect.com/help-center)
### How should I use the Email Finder?
You may use this search email address tool to find company email addresses, get prospects' valid emails and other data about them, both on the platform's web app via Search and Enrich and on LinkedIn via our Email Finder extension (data can also be searched on prospective companies' websites).
### What data should I upload to find an email address?
To find an email for a prospect, the following data in our web app set is required: first name, last name, and the company name of the domain (which can be selected from 17 filters). Based on this information, GetProspect will provide the email address and other prospect data.
### Is it ethical to use an Email Finder?
If you scrape the email addresses for legitimate purposes, such as sales or job hunting, and they are collected and used in accordance with applicable laws and regulations, it may be considered ethical. But, if you extract emails for sending spam, phishing, or any other illegal purpose, then it’s unethical.
### Where does GetProspect find emails?
GetProspect Email finder uses its powerful database of over 200 million business contacts with emails and 26 million companies to find email addresses, as well as LinkedIn's largest and most current business contacts database with over 900 million users.
### How accurate is the Email Finder?
The accuracy of valid emails that were found on the platform is 95%.
According to the latest tests, GetProspect Email Finder found 84 valid email addresses out of 100 contacts, which is higher than in such alternatives as ZoomInfo, Hunter.io, Lusha, ContactOut, and others.
### How can I extract an email address from a website?
The GetProspect company Email Finder extracts business email addresses from any company website. Once the extension is installed, it can be used for fetching basic info about the companies, employees' email addresses and getting essential data about them. Just click on the extension icon to find emails and leads you need by name or job title.
### Is the Getprospect Email Finder a free service?
GetProspect Email Finder provides lifetime access to 50 free new email addresses each month.
### How much does the Email Finder cost?
Paid Email Finder subscriptions start at $49 per month with 1,000 valid emails and 2,000 verifications. You can find email addresses for just $34 per month with an annual payment. Find out more about it at [Pricing.](https://getprospect.com/pricing)
![Founder](https://getprospect.com/_next/image?url=https%3A%2F%2Fstatic.getprospect.com%2Fstrapi%2Ffounder_2x_c90094e366.jpg&w=256&q=75)
Dmytro Shulha
CEO and Founder of GetProspect
  *   * [](https://www.linkedin.com/in/dima-shulga/)
  * [](https://x.com/dima_shulha)
  * [](https://www.facebook.com/dmytro.shylga)


Hi, I’m Dima, founder and CEO at GetProspect.
The idea for GetProspect came after talking with a salesperson friend who struggled to find valid emails. I realized that the process of finding and organizing leads was time-consuming and frustrating, and there had to be a better way.
I had experience building SAAS tools and created MVP in just a couple of months. I worked so great, and demand was so high that it grew very fast. Through hard work and dedication, GetProspect turned into a successful company with customers all over the world.
We are building an all-in-one platform that will help businesses to find email addresses and leads, send them, and close deals. Our goal is to build a great company with a startup culture where we are happy to work and deliver outstanding services that customers will love. We rely on the latest technologies and trends to bring innovations to our users.
I hope you’ll feel our love through the product and it will bring true value.
Please, let me know if we can do something even better. 
Show more
